chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Admiralty Suit No.01 of 2012 Date Order with Signature of Judge For orders on Commissioner’s Reference dated 27.05.2025. 22.09.2025 Syed Muhammad Bazil Ali Rizvi Adv., holding brief for Mr. Imran Taj, Advocate for the plaintiff. Mr. Ayaz Sharif Malik, Advocate for defendants No.1 to 3. ------------------------------- The counsel holding brief for plaintiff’s counsel submits that the then counsel of the plaintiff that is late Khawaja Shamsul Islam Advocate had submitted a statement before the learned Commissioner for recording evidence which is available in the Court file that the plaintiff no longer wishes to pursue the matter whereafter the learned Commissioner has filed this Reference dated 27.05.2025. Today, the counsel holding brief submits that the plaintiff no longer wishes to pursue the matter. In the light of the submissions made by the former counsel of the plaintiff, the instant suit is dismissed as not pressed. The Commissioner’s Reference dated 27.05.2025 is taken on record subject to all just exceptions. J U D G E Asif
